LG
Namaste! Welcome to LawGovern Compliance Intelligence.

I can answer any question about Indian corporate compliance automatically — no manual input needed.

📚 I cover: Companies Act 2013 · SEBI LODR · SEBI PIT · IEPF · ICDR · SAST · LLP Act · IBC 2016 · FEMA · FCRA · All MCA forms · All penalties & deadlines · Latest amendments up to Feb 2026
Ask anything — forms, penalties, deadlines, who needs to comply, amendments, procedures. I fetch and explain automatically.
Penalty for not appointing CS?
Small company board meetings?
Is MGT-8 still required?
Who must file MR-1?
DPT-3 due date?
LODR Amendment 2026 changes?
OPC board meeting rules?
IPO T+3 allotment?
Auditor rotation rules?
Section 8 board meetings?
Trading window closure rules?
IEPF transfer deadlines?
